engine.name: kosmo_step_semantic_probe
engine.note: IfcOpenShell/Bonsai was not available locally, so this proof reads STEP entity semantics only. It does not triangulate or edit IFC geometry.

human_checklist.question: Open `data/source-files/Bestand_Kontext.ifc` in Bonsai/IfcOpenShell or equivalent and confirm the semantic tree loads without import errors.
human_checklist.evidence_hint: IfcOpenShell machine import passed 13/13; visual Bonsai-style tree review remains human.

human_checklist.question: Confirm whether 2 IFCBUILDINGELEMENTPROXY objects are acceptable as semantic Bestand/context elements or need reclassification.
Confirm all 2 elements belong to IFCBUILDINGSTOREY #4 Level 0 and there are no missing/extra storeys.
Confirm object placements and project units match the expected meter-based project context.
human_checklist.evidence_hint: 2 elements have object placement; geometry extents are 10 x 8 x 3.35 m.

human_checklist.question: Compare the semantic IFC import against DXF underlay, IFC bounds and LV95/project origin.
human_checklist.evidence_hint: Alignment hint: missing_dxf_source; center offset estimate 0 m.

human_checklist.question: Inspect large footprint/height outliers in the geometry preview before trusting the IFC as a design seed.
human_checklist.evidence_hint: 12 faces resolved; inspect SVG preview and element samples.

human_checklist.question: Check `Pset_AtelierBlaupause_Object` fields such as OBJEKTART, DACH_MIN, DACH_MAX and gml_id for reliability.
Review the generated Mass/material_unknown layer plan and decide whether finer wall/slab/roof/support classes are possible.
human_checklist.evidence_hint: 5 generated layer groups; approved_for_import is false.

human_checklist.question: Open the audited Blender review blend and visually confirm it is only a locked reference underlay.
Only after the checks above: decide keep as source review, accept as context, reject or approve as design seed.

decision_options.when: default until the IFC has been opened in a semantic IFC viewer and checked against the list below
decision_options.effect: keeps context as reference only; no design seed, no model generation

decision_options.when: after semantic viewer confirms the IFC is reliable as reference but not yet suitable as editable seed
decision_options.effect: allows stronger reference use but still no design generation

decision_options.when: only after semantic classes, storeys, placement, units, origin and layer mapping are reviewed by a human
decision_options.effect: can unlock design-seed workflow only if approved_for_design_generation is also true

decision_options.when: if semantic classes, origin, units or source authority are not trustworthy
decision_options.effect: removes this IFC semantic candidate from downstream seed consideration

next_actions: Open the IFC in Bonsai/IfcOpenShell or an equivalent semantic IFC viewer.
Compare the semantic element tree with design/ifc-semantic-proof.generated.md.
Compare geometry/origin with viz/previews/ifc-dxf-alignment-preview.svg and the audited Blender review file.
Keep context-selection approved_for_design_generation=false until the checklist is completed by a human reviewer.

engine.name: kosmo_step_semantic_probe

next_actions: Open the IFC in Bonsai/IfcOpenShell or an equivalent semantic IFC viewer/import path.
Human-review classes, storey containment, placements, units and coordinates.

engine.name: kosmo_step_geometry_preview
engine.note: Read-only STEP geometry preview. This resolves faceted BREP bounds and top projection but does not import editable BIM geometry.

next_actions: Open the SVG preview and compare the top projection with DXF context and IFC bounds.
Review outlier extents, units and origin before considering any semantic IFC design-seed change.
Keep context-selection approved_for_design_generation=false until a human verifies geometry and semantic classes.

engine.name: kosmo_ifc_dxf_alignment_preview
engine.note: Read-only SVG overlay of accepted DXF context polylines and IFC geometry bounding boxes. This is a visual alignment review, not a CAD/BIM import.

next_actions: Register a local DXF source before alignment review.

engine.name: kosmo_ifc_layer_planner
engine.note: Review-only layer proposal from semantic IFC proof and geometry preview. It creates no GLB and approves no design seed.

next_actions: Open the layer-plan SVG and compare layer roles against the IFC viewer.
Human-review wall/slab/support classifications before Blender or ArchiCAD import.
Prepare 5 review-only collections/layers, but keep approved_for_import=false.
Only after review: generate GLB layer exports and Blender collections from approved layer keys.
